nasb.text: All who went out of the gate of his city listened to Hamor and to his son Shechem, and every male was circumcised, all who went out of the gate of his city.

esv.text: And all who went out of the gate of his city listened to Hamor and his son Shechem, and every male was circumcised, all who went out of the gate of his city.

cnv.text: 所有從城門出入的人，都聽從了哈抹和他兒子示劍的話。於是，所有從城門出入的男子，都受了割禮。

ccb.text: 在城门进出的人听了哈抹父子的话，都表示赞同。于是，城里的男子都接受了割礼。

csbs.text: 所有从城门口出入的人，都听了哈抹和他儿子示剑的话；于是所有从城门口出入的男子，都受了割礼。
